description.zh-cn: 图片优化与水印：基于 GD 为图片批量添加文字水印(位置/透明度/字号/颜色可配)并按质量压缩,支持处理 storage/public 下指定目录、单图预览与 image:watermark 命令,保护商品主图版权并减小体积。
description.en: Image optimize & watermark (GD-based): batch-add text watermarks (position/opacity/size/color) and recompress images, process a folder under storage/public, single-image preview and an image:watermark command — protect product imagery and reduce size.
